required_fields.label: Report type
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Quarterly Board Report, Annual Review, Special Committee Report

required_fields.label: Financial highlights
required_fields.placeholder: Key financial metrics: revenue, EBITDA, net income, cash position, vs. budget and prior period...

required_fields.label: Strategic initiatives update
required_fields.placeholder: Status of major strategic initiatives, milestones achieved, and upcoming objectives...

required_fields.label: Key risks and concerns
required_fields.placeholder: Top risks facing the organization, emerging threats, and mitigation status...

optional_fields.label: Key operational metrics
optional_fields.placeholder: Employee count, customer count, churn rate, NPS, or other operational KPIs...

optional_fields.label: Compliance or regulatory updates
optional_fields.placeholder: New regulations, audit findings, compliance status changes...

optional_fields.label: Capital expenditure update
optional_fields.placeholder: Major CapEx projects, status, and budget vs. actual...

optional_fields.label: Board actions or approvals needed
optional_fields.placeholder: Any resolutions, approvals, or decisions the board needs to make...

optional_fields.label: Forward guidance or outlook
optional_fields.placeholder: Updated projections, market outlook, and planned initiatives for next period...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload financial statements, P&L, balance sheet, or cash flow data
Upload prior board reports or strategic plans for reference
Upload company brand guidelines or board report template (optional)

sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.instructions: One-page summary of the most important developments, financial results, and items requiring board attention. Written for rapid consumption.

sections.label: Financial Performance
sections.instructions: Detailed financial review covering revenue, expenses, profitability, cash flow, and balance sheet highlights. Include variance analysis vs. budget and prior period.

sections.label: Strategic Initiatives
sections.instructions: Progress update on each major strategic initiative. Use a consistent format: objective, status (green/yellow/red), milestones achieved, next steps.

sections.label: Operational Highlights
sections.instructions: Key operational metrics and notable achievements or challenges. Cover personnel, customers, product/service delivery, and technology.

sections.label: Risk Assessment
sections.instructions: Updated risk register with top risks ranked by severity. Include new or escalated risks, mitigation progress, and residual risk levels.

sections.label: Compliance Update
sections.instructions: Regulatory compliance status, recent or upcoming regulatory changes, and any open compliance issues or audit findings.

sections.label: Forward Outlook
sections.instructions: Updated projections for the next reporting period. Key assumptions, opportunities, and potential headwinds.

sections.label: Board Actions Required
sections.instructions: Clearly enumerate any resolutions, approvals, or decisions the board needs to make at this meeting.

sections.label: Appendices
sections.instructions: Detailed financial tables, departmental reports, capital expenditure tracking, and supporting data referenced in the main report.
